reviews.review_msg: Overall a good teacher, his lectures are pretty much alright and fun in some occasions; the thing is, he doesn't allow cellphones and also if you don't have a physical copy for the book they are going to read you're not allowed to use a copy from your laptop since electronic devices are not allowed; your only options are printing or buying the book

Matt was one of the best teachers if not the best teachers I have ever had. During my semester with him he was extremely accessible, gave his best to make sure we were well versed in what we were studying and more than anything was able to assist me in performing highly in a subject I was simply just expecting to pass, I would highly recommend him.

actually if you are having different opinion with him, he will argue with you and prove that his are right.
if you get a different opinion with him on essay, you might get a low mark in your essay

Weird gradings
Occasionally rude behaviour
Put little effort in preparation for class
